converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Animal Science records
New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Animal Science
American Dairy Science Association
21-14-2565
3.2 cubic feet. 3.2 cubic feet.
1949-1990. Publications, Reports, Research Materials. Records pertaining to research and extension, including the New York State Fair, particularly with sheep, swine, and goats, 1949-1973. Collection material in English 2093676
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Guy Smith
Date completed:
2006
EAD encoding:
Anne Eller, July 2007
Date modified:
RMC Staff, April 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
C. R. Henderson, for many years a professor in the Department of Animal Science, was world-renowned in the area of animal breeding.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Records pertaining to research and extension, including the New York State Fair, particularly with sheep, swine, and goats, 1949-1973.
Also, two video cassettes of "The Legacy of C. R. Henderson," from the American Dairy Science Association Symposium, June 1990, and radio talks (1949-1955) given by faculty over the Rural Radio Network.
Cite As:
Department of Animal Science records, #21-14-2565. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Radio programs. Goats. Swine. Sheep. Animal industry. Henderson, C. R. (Charles R.) Rural Radio Network

Including: American Dairy Science Association, Meeting, University of Vermont, Burlington, June 23-26, 1941American Dairy Science Association, Ontario Agriculture College, Guelph, June 24-26th, 1947The Legacy of C.
